parts.text:
[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email]
[Your LinkedIn Profile]

[Date]

[Hiring Manager Name]
[Company Name]
[Company Address]

Dear [Hiring Manager Name],

I am writing to express my formal interest in the [Job Title] position at [Company Name], as advertised on [Platform where you found the job]. With my background in [Your Field/Industry] and my experience in [mention 1–2 key skills or experiences], I am confident that my qualifications align with the requirements of this role.

In my most recent position at [Current/Previous Company], I was responsible for [briefly mention a primary responsibility]. During this time, I successfully [mention a specific achievement or result]. This experience has allowed me to develop a proficiency in [relevant skill], which I am eager to apply toward the continued success of [Company Name].

I am impressed by [Company Name]’s commitment to [mention a specific company value or project], and I look forward to the possibility of contributing to your team. Thank you for your time and for considering my application.

I have attached my resume for your review and welcome the opportunity to discuss my candidacy further in an interview.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
